message:
perf(demo): add frame stride optimization to visual effects updates

Implement quality-aware update throttling for visual effects:
- Store last_quality after computing in render phase
- Add fx_stride() function to determine update frequency based on quality
- Only update effects when frame index is multiple of stride
- Apply stride gating to: Shape3D, Particles, Matrix, Tunnel, Fire,
  ReactionDiffusion, Metaballs, Plasma

This reduces computational overhead during degraded rendering by
skipping effect simulation updates on intermediate frames while
maintaining smooth visual appearance at the current quality level.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
